signals.raw:
Cavaliers Lead Raptors 2-0 in First-Round Playoff Series After Game 2 Win | YES (Cavs advancing) | HIGH confidence** [1][2][3]

Cleveland Cavaliers defeated Toronto Raptors 115-105 in Game 2 on Monday at Rocket Arena, securing a 2-0 series lead after a 126-113 Game 1 victory on Saturday; this marks their 12th consecutive playoff win against Toronto, tying an NBA record.[1][2][3] Series shifts to T
